text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, while talking with Mejiro Dober in my
office...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Sorry to interrupt your discussion, but...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: I come bearing good news for you two!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Good news?

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
The thing is, because of how well you did during
your junior year...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
You've been selected by the URA as Best Junior
Year Goddess! Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The title of Goddess is awarded to those who run
in races like the Hanshin J.F., Triple Tiara, and
Queen Elizabeth II Cup.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The accolade is awarded to one racer in each
year: junior, classic, and senior. It's a huge honor
for Mejiro Dober to be selected to represent her
year!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I... I was chosen as Goddess?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I can't believe it!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Congratulations! ♪ The award ceremony is going
to be held in a few days, so don't forget to
prepare a speech!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Th-there's a ceremony?! And I have to give a
speech?! I-I see, um... okay...
choice_data_list: We'll have to make sure you're ready!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I-I know! I'm not going to get up there without
practicing...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Y-yeah... I'll make sure to practice a lot!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day of the award ceremony arrives in the
blink of an eye...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day of the award ceremony arrives in the
blink of an eye...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(It's going to be fine. I've practiced like a hundred
times. Everything will be fine...)

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
Now, let's hear a word from this year's junior-year
Goddess, Mejiro Dober!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Clap, clap, clap, clap!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober is immediately met with a flood of
well-wishes and applause, as well as flashes from
countless cameras.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Uh... Um...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: (Oh no... My mind's gone blank.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Something seems off. It looks like stage fright has
gotten her tongue all tied!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Desperate to help however I can, I start wildly
waving my hands in her direction!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: (Huh? It's Trainer...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(What is he making that desperate face for? Idiot.
He's going to make me laugh.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(She looks so desperate, a far cry from her usual
gorgeous face. Heh... I think that did the trick!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I, um... I'd like to express my deepest gratitude to
everyone today.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I, um... I'd like to express my deepest gratitude to
everyone today.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I'm elated beyond words at having received such
a magnificent award...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Phew... That was terrifying...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Cut it with the flattery. I completely forgot my
speech and just blurted out whatever came to
mind up there...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Hardly... I forgot everything I'd prepared and just
rambled endlessly up there...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. But geez, you looked hilarious from the
stage. You were freaking out so much.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I saw you waving, you know? You looked
so frantic and silly, I couldn't help smiling.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Anyway... Thanks for having my back.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, Trainer. I couldn't have done it
without you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Afterward, I hear her speech was well received by
fans for being so sincere despite its brevity.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Afterward, I hear her speech was well received by
fans for being so sincere despite its brevity.
